articleAudits.title: Rosemary Apricot Spritz for Spring Hosting
articleAudits.metaDescription: A more complete spring spritz guide with stronger balance logic for apricot sweetness, rosemary aroma, batching, and keeping the finish dry enough to stay refreshing.

articleAudits.metaDescription: A fuller yuzu gimlet riff guide with clearer substitution logic, dilution reasoning, and better guardrails for keeping bright citrus cocktails precise instead of perfumed.

articleAudits.title: V60 Bloom Timing Guide: How Long to Bloom for Cleaner, Sweeter Cups
articleAudits.metaDescription: A practical guide to bloom timing, degassing, and drawdown control for more consistent V60 brews.

articleAudits.title: Choosing Decaf for Espresso Milk Drinks Without Ending Up With Flat Flavor
articleAudits.metaDescription: How to choose decaf for espresso milk drinks with better guidance on roast development, solubility, and what still shows up once milk softens the shot.

articleAudits.title: Smoked Cherry Sour: How to Add Smoke Without Smothering the Drink
articleAudits.metaDescription: A stronger guide to smoked cherry sours that explains smoke restraint, cherry balance, dilution, and the safety-minded choices that keep the drink convincing.

articleAudits.title: Espresso Yield Ratios Explained: When to Pull Short, Standard, or Long
articleAudits.metaDescription: A grounded look at dose-to-yield ratios so home baristas can dial espresso based on taste instead of dogma.

articleAudits.title: Cold Brew Negroni Riff: A Coffee Cocktail That Stays Bitter, Balanced, and Dry
articleAudits.metaDescription: A fuller guide to building a cold brew Negroni riff that stays bitter, dry, and coherent instead of slipping into muddy sweetness.

articleAudits.title: Why Your Pour-Over Tastes Bitter: The Fastest Fixes to Try First
articleAudits.metaDescription: A sharper troubleshooting guide for bitter pour-over coffee with practical adjustments for grind, agitation, brew time, and roast-related bitterness.

articleAudits.title: Sesame Orange Old Fashioned: A Savory-Sweet Whiskey Riff That Still Drinks Clean
articleAudits.metaDescription: An original old fashioned variation that uses toasted sesame and orange oils without becoming heavy or cloying.

articleAudits.title: When a Hand Grinder Upgrade Actually Improves Your Coffee
articleAudits.metaDescription: A stronger grinder buyer guide that helps home brewers decide whether a hand grinder upgrade will actually improve cup quality or whether another bottleneck deserves the money first.

articleAudits.title: Clarified Pineapple Highball: Tropical Flavor With a Dry, Transparent Finish
articleAudits.metaDescription: A clearer guide to pineapple highballs that explains when clarification helps, how dryness is protected, and why tropical flavor does not need juice-bar heaviness.

articleAudits.title: How to Steam Microfoam at Home Without Turning Milk Into Hot Bubbles
articleAudits.metaDescription: A practical microfoam guide for home espresso setups with clearer cues for stretching, polishing, pouring, and fixing common milk-texture mistakes.
